DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-02-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jake Freed (415-276-6532) for Defendant/Moving party JPMORGAN CHASE BANK.
No other appearances.

The Court announcees the tentative ruling and inquires re: the declaration. Defense counsel did not provide the required documents for the court to review. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:
